mechanism: Anethole-rich essential oil and polyphenols provide carminative, antispasmodic, and mild anti-inflammatory effects in GI models.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated at food-level intake; concentrated preparations may cause allergic reactions or photosensitivity in sensitive individuals.
